name: Coca-Cola Cake #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the Coke, Wesson oil, 1/4 cup of butter, and 1/4 cup cocoa in a saucepan over medium heat until boiling.
2. Remove from heat and stir in the marshmallows until melted.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, baking soda, eggs, sugar, and vanilla.
4. Gradually add the Coke mixture to the flour mixture, stirring well to combine.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 13x9-inch pan.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes in a preheated oven set to 350°F (175°C), or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Meanwhile, prepare the icing by heating the Coke and cocoa in a saucepan over medium heat until boiling.
8. Remove from heat and stir in the powdered sugar and vanilla until smooth.
9. Pour the icing over the hot cake while it is still warm, allowing it to soak into the layers.
10. Allow the cake to cool completely before serving.
